positive: A mystical, stylized forest scene featuring glowing bioluminescent flora, interwoven with ancient, gnarled tree roots. The central subject is a highly stylized, majestic creature resembling a fox or wolf, depicted in a dynamic, graceful pose, standing among oversized, luminous ferns. Use a deep, sapphire blue and emerald green color palette, contrasted with warm, glowing yellow accents from the bioluminescence. The style should be highly decorative, combining Art Nouveau curves with modern graphic poster art. Focus on clean silhouettes and strong, contrasting lines. Perfect for a central, repeat-pattern oriented apparel print. Cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed, clean vector look, high contrast, volumetric fog.
